ct01.name: living
ct01.description: A fully sentient inhabitant of Jadame. Morale range: -5 to 5. Luck range: -3 to 3. Fallen Living creatures count towards the power of Necromancy reanimation after battle

ct02.name: magic creature
ct02.description: A beast or beast-like creature. Jadame's beasts often have fantastical powers; denizens of other planes, even more so. Morale range: -3 to 3. Luck range: -5 to 5. Fallen Magic Creatures count towards the power of Necromancy reanimation after battle

ct03.name: embodiment
ct03.description: A spirit, soul or other intangible power that has coalesced into material form. Morale range: -3 to 3. Luck range: -3 to 3. Fallen Embodiments do NOT count towards the power of Necromancy reanimation after battle

ct04.name: undead
ct04.description: A creature or person whose life has been prolonged by unnatural means. Morale: Always neutral. Luck range: -5 to 5. Fallen Undead do NOT count towards the power of Necromancy reanimation after battle

ct05.name: hive spawn
ct05.description: A part of a hivemind that serves a powerful lord from beyond. Morale range: -5 to 5. Luck range: -5 to 5. Fallen Hive Spawn count towards the power of Necromancy reanimation after battle

ct06.name: dragon
ct06.description: A powerful ancient creature, often intelligent and imbued with wondrous magic. Morale range: 0 to 5. Luck range: 0 to 3. Fallen Dragons count towards the power of Necromancy reanimation after battle
